title: Galactic Orbiting Constellation: 2026-05-23 autonomy curation opening
body: No other active claims or live commit intents were present at open. Mode: dedicated-knowledge-curation. Claim 004d9fd6 covers only the 2026-05-23 team-session autonomy recovery file; working item by item in place with no archive, split, shard, rename, or new buffer file.
